languages.original_text: "I never imagined that a specimen of one of the most dangerous galactic species would voluntarily join the Rogue Trader's retinue. Nuncius, you are familiar with the concise xenological characterisation of the Drukhari, yes? Their morphology is poorly understood, and this presents a rare opportunity to observe a member of that race at close quarters."

languages.text: "Едва ли я мог предполагать, что в свиту Вольного Торговца на добровольных началах войдет экземпляр одного из самых опасных галактических видов. Нунциус, ты ведь знаком с краткой ксенологической характеристикой друкари? Их морфология изучена слабо, и возможность наблюдать представителя расы вблизи — редчайший казус".

"I never imagined that a specimen of one of the most dangerous galactic species would voluntarily join the Rogue Trader's retinue. Nuncius, you are familiar with the concise xenological characterisation of the Drukhari, yes? Their morphology is poorly understood, and this presents a rare opportunity to observe a member of that race at close quarters."

languages.text: «Nunca imaginé que un espécimen de la especie galáctica más peligrosa se uniría voluntariamente al séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente. Nuncius, usted conoce la caracterización xenológica exacta de los Drukhari, ¿verdad? No se sabe mucho de su morfología, y esto presenta la rara oportunidad de observar a un miembro de la raza desde la cercanía».
languages.original_text: "I never imagined that a specimen of one of the most dangerous galactic species would voluntarily join the Rogue Trader's retinue. Nuncius, you are familiar with the concise xenological characterisation of the Drukhari, yes? Their morphology is poorly understood, and this presents a rare opportunity to observe a member of that race at close quarters."

traits.locale_text: «Nunca imaginé que un espécimen de la especie galáctica más peligrosa se uniría voluntariamente al séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente. Nuncius, usted conoce la caracterización xenológica exacta de los Drukhari, ¿verdad? No se sabe mucho de su morfología, y esto presenta la rara oportunidad de observar a un miembro de la raza desde la cercanía».

languages.text: 「銀河で最も危険な種の一つの標本が、自ら進んでローグトレーダーの一行に加わるとは、思いもよりませんでした。ヌンキウス、君はドルカリの簡潔な異種族学的特徴づけに通じていますね？ 彼らの形態学はほとんど解明されておらず、これはあの種族の一員を間近で観察する、稀な好機です」
languages.original_text: "I never imagined that a specimen of one of the most dangerous galactic species would voluntarily join the Rogue Trader's retinue. Nuncius, you are familiar with the concise xenological characterisation of the Drukhari, yes? Their morphology is poorly understood, and this presents a rare opportunity to observe a member of that race at close quarters."

traits.locale_text: 「銀河で最も危険な種の一つの標本が、自ら進んでローグトレーダーの一行に加わるとは、思いもよりませんでした。ヌンキウス、君はドルカリの簡潔な異種族学的特徴づけに通じていますね？ 彼らの形態学はほとんど解明されておらず、これはあの種族の一員を間近で観察する、稀な好機です」

languages.text: “我从没想过，一个全银河最危险种族的样本，居然会主动加入行商浪人的随行队伍。努恩修斯，你还记得对黑暗灵族的简明异形学描述吧？我们在其形态学上知之甚少，这可是近距离观察该种族个体的难得机会。”
languages.original_text: "I never imagined that a specimen of one of the most dangerous galactic species would voluntarily join the Rogue Trader's retinue. Nuncius, you are familiar with the concise xenological characterisation of the Drukhari, yes? Their morphology is poorly understood, and this presents a rare opportunity to observe a member of that race at close quarters."

traits.locale_text: “我从没想过，一个全银河最危险种族的样本，居然会主动加入行商浪人的随行队伍。努恩修斯，你还记得对黑暗灵族的简明异形学描述吧？我们在其形态学上知之甚少，这可是近距离观察该种族个体的难得机会。”

languages.text: "Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass sich ein Vertreter einer der gefährlichsten Spezies der Galaxie freiwillig dem Gefolge {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} anschließen würde. Nuncius, Ihr seid mit der präzisen xenologischen Charakterisierung der Drukhari vertraut, ja? Ihre Morphologie ist kaum erforscht und wir haben die seltene Gelegenheit, einen Vertreter ihrer Rasse aus der Nähe zu beobachten."
languages.original_text: "I never imagined that a specimen of one of the most dangerous galactic species would voluntarily join the Rogue Trader's retinue. Nuncius, you are familiar with the concise xenological characterisation of the Drukhari, yes? Their morphology is poorly understood, and this presents a rare opportunity to observe a member of that race at close quarters."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass sich ein Vertreter einer der gefährlichsten Spezies der Galaxie freiwillig dem Gefolge {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} anschließen würde. Nuncius, Ihr seid mit der präzisen xenologischen Charakterisierung der Drukhari vertraut, ja? Ihre Morphologie ist kaum erforscht und wir haben die seltene Gelegenheit, einen Vertreter ihrer Rasse aus der Nähe zu beobachten."

languages.text: « Je n'aurais jamais imaginé qu'un spécimen appartenant à l'une des espèces galactiques les plus dangereuses rejoindrait de son propre chef l'entourage {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. Nuncius, tu es familier des caractéristiques xénologiques des Drukharis, du moins dans les grandes lignes, n'est-ce pas ? Leur morphologie est mal comprise, et nous tenons là une rare opportunité d'observer de près un membre de cette race. »
languages.original_text: "I never imagined that a specimen of one of the most dangerous galactic species would voluntarily join the Rogue Trader's retinue. Nuncius, you are familiar with the concise xenological characterisation of the Drukhari, yes? Their morphology is poorly understood, and this presents a rare opportunity to observe a member of that race at close quarters."

Leur morphologie est mal comprise, et nous tenons là une rare opportunité d'observer de près un membre de cette race. »

languages.text: "Galaksideki en tehlikeli türlerden birine ait bir deneğin Hür Tacir'in maiyetine gönüllü olarak katılacağını hiç düşünmezdim. Drukharilerin kısa zenolojik özelliklerini biliyorsun, değil mi Nuncius? Morfolojileri pek anlaşılmamış. Bu da bu ırkın bir mensubunu yakından gözlemlemek için nadir bulunan bir fırsat."
